case_title: CALFOX, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION, FELL PROPERTIES vs. OLIVER, MARVIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALFOX, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION, FELL PROPERTIESINC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AND POLK MARKET COA CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER, MARVIN DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT OLIVER, MARVIN

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALFOX, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION, FELL PROPERTIESINC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AND POLK MARKET COA CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE: CARLOS BAKER, JR; CLERK:E. CLAVERIA (NO REPORTER) 10:06AM: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF'S COUNSEL MERCEDES GAVIN PRESENT WITH DEFENDANT MARVIN OLIVER NOT APPEARING. PLFF'S CALLED JAVIER MALDONADO, S/E. EXHIBITS PRESENTED AS FOLLOWS: EXH 1 (3-DAY NOTICE), FOR ID AND IN EVIDENCE; EXH 2 (RENTAL AGREEMENT), FOR ID, IN EVIDENCE; EXH 3 (PROOF OF SERVICE), FOR ID, IN EVIDENCE. PRAYER OF PLFF: FOR RENT AND DAMAGES IN AMOUNT OF $5,056; COST OF $80, REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEE OF $500, RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES OF 1390 MARKET ST, #2408,SF, CALIFORNIA AND LEASE AGREEMENT BE FORFEITED. GRANTED. (JUDGMENT SIGNED BY COURT)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVER, MARVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET, #2408, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $5,056.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,636.00, LEASE FORFEITED
